chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–4966 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.22738/2023. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.08.2024 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Even on the last date the petitioner’s counsel was called absent and there is no intimation either today. Dismissed for non- prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
